summary: Comprehensive testing of Play Store compliant account deletion feature. All 12 backend API tests pass (100%). All 9 frontend UI tests pass (100%). Account deletion works correctly with password verification, ownership blocking, cascade deletion for sole owners, and token invalidation.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend DELETE /api/auth/account endpoint correctly implements password verification for password-auth users
Google auth users correctly skip password requirement (auth_provider='google')
Ownership transfer requirement properly enforced - owners with other members get 409 Conflict
Sole owner deletion properly cascades to delete entire community + all related data
Token invalidation works correctly - deleted user's token returns 401 on subsequent requests
Frontend correctly shows/hides password input based on auth_provider
Frontend 'Permanently delete account' button correctly disabled until password entered
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create disposable users via /api/auth/bootstrap with TEST_ prefix. Users are deleted as part of test execution.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Account deletion feature fully functional. Backend endpoint: DELETE /api/auth/account. For password-auth users, requires password in request body. Google auth users skip password (auth_provider='google'). Community owners with other members get 409 block - must transfer ownership first. Sole owners can delete - cascades to delete entire community and all data (events, memories, threads, polls, announcements, chat rooms, subyards, kinships, etc). Token is invalidated after deletion. Frontend: Settings page (/settings) has delete account section at bottom (data-testid='settings-delete-account-card'). Clicking 'Delete my account' button (data-testid='settings-delete-account-button') shows confirmation panel (data-testid='settings-delete-confirm-panel'). Password input (data-testid='settings-delete-password-input') only shown for password-auth users. 'Permanently delete account' button (data-testid='settings-delete-confirm-button') disabled until password entered. Cancel button (data-testid='settings-delete-cancel-button') hides the panel. After successful deletion, localStorage 'gathering-cypher-auth' is cleared and user redirected to /login.
features_tested: DELETE /api/auth/account with correct password deletes account
DELETE /api/auth/account with wrong password returns 403 Forbidden
DELETE /api/auth/account without password returns 400 Bad Request for password-auth users
DELETE /api/auth/account with empty payload returns 400 for password-auth users
Community owner with other members gets 409 Conflict block message
Non-owner member can delete their account without restriction
Sole community owner can delete - cascades to delete community + all data
Token becomes invalid after account deletion (returns 401)
All authenticated endpoints reject deleted user's token
Settings page shows delete account section at bottom
Clicking 'Delete my account' button shows confirmation panel
Confirmation panel shows password input for password-auth users
'Permanently delete account' button is disabled until password entered
Cancel button hides the confirmation panel
'Permanently delete account' button enabled after password entered
